category_sources: source_facts.description says Dragon and Tandy 8-bit computer emulator; official XRoar homepage says it emulates Dragon and Tandy systems.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is xroar; official homepage title uses XRoar.
docs_sources: Official XRoar homepage links the manual in HTML and PDF formats; HTML manual is the dedicated documentation surface.
repo_sources: Official XRoar homepage lists the Git repository clone URL at www.6809.org.uk/git/xroar.git.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies Dragon and Tandy emulation; official XRoar homepage lists supported Dragon, Tandy Colour Computer, and MC-10 systems.
